project_type: AWS CDK TypeScript IaC project - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: npm with TypeScript compiler (tsc), AWS CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform, aws-cdk-lib/assertions for CDK tests, snapshot testing
verification_instructions: 1. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage` to verify all tests pass. 2. Run `npx cdk synth --context environment=dev` to verify CDK synthesis succeeds.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm. No Docker daemon available for docker build. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running jest.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits required (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, refactor:). Strict TDD workflow. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with code. L2/L3 CDK constructs preferred.
key_patterns: CDK stacks in lib/, Lambda code in lambda/, tests in test/, entry point in bin/cdk-base.ts. Uses CDK context for environment selection. Pipeline stack is optional via enablePipeline context flag.
directory_structure: bin/ (CDK app entry), lib/ (stack definitions), lambda/audio-processor/ (Lambda handler), test/ (Jest tests with snapshots), .github/ (CI + agent guidelines)
